description_long: This is a single-story modern house featuring a spacious open-plan layout with multiple rooms, including a large glass-enclosed sunroom or pool area. The exterior walls are primarily gray with black-framed windows and a prominent garage attached to one side. The house includes a mix of brick and smooth wall finishes, with several large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The interior is furnished with contemporary decor, visible through the windows and open spaces, and there are several green plants adding a touch of nature. The roof over the sunroom is transparent, likely made of glass or polycarbonate, while the rest of the roof is flat and solid. The main entryway is marked by a blue door and a small porch area, giving the house a welcoming appearance.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass sunroom, attached garage, and a mix of brick and smooth gray exterior walls. Features include expansive windows, a blue main door, and contemporary interior decor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main blue entry door, black-framed windows, attached garage, and a glimpse into the open-plan living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large glass-enclosed sunroom or pool area, with the garage and hot tub visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the transparent roof of the sunroom, back windows, and the garage entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional rooms, interior furnishings, and the connection between the sunroom and the rest of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a blue door, small porch, and minimal overhang, with clean lines and no decorative columns.
